The PA DOC Inmate Locator (inmatelocator.cor.pa.gov) and VINELink (vinelink.vineapps.com) are JavaScript-rendered, session-based portals that require direct browser interaction and do not expose individual records to automated or search-engine queries. No third-party indexed source returned a matching record. To obtain current status — including whether still at SCI Cambridge Springs, transferred, paroled, or discharged — please query directly at: (1) https://inmatelocator.cor.pa.gov using inmate number PE1239; (2) https://vinelink.vineapps.com/state/PA/ENGLISH using name or offender ID; or (3) call PA SAVIN at 1-866-972-7284.
